div.class: relative min-h-screen overflow-hidden bg-white text-default font-diatype

main.class: absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full z-10 text-[#040404] flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-5 lg:gap-10 p-6

p.class: text-center opacity-60 text-lg lg:text-2xl max-w-[40ch] leading-[1.25]

main.p: Experience the new standard for trading perpetuals on Solana.

div.class: flex flex-col items-center gap-5 justify-center tracking-[0.07em] w-fit mx-auto

button.class: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium transition-[color,background-color,border-color,transform] duration-150 ease active:scale-97 focus-visible:outline-hidden focus-visible:ring focus-visible:ring-primary/75 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed cursor-pointer [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0 text-default hover:bg-button-hover rounded-lg p-4 bg-fire-2 uppercase h-auto w-full sm:w-auto

footer.class: absolute bottom-10 left-0 w-full flex flex-col items-center justify-between gap-4

a.class: text-border text-right flex-1 flex items-center justify-end gap-1 relative flex-wrap opacity-60 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-150 group
